creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-01-21 19:11:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im               Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-im/msn-proxy     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  msn-proxy is a lightweight transparent proxy used to control/monitor
  the use of msn messenger clients. support all active protocols (all
  clients). lots of features.
  
  WWW: http://msn-proxy.sourceforge.net
  
  PR:             ports/119826
  Submitted by:   Luiz Otavio O Souza <loos.br at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.74      +1 -0      ports/net-im/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/net-im/msn-proxy/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-im/msn-proxy/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net-im/msn-proxy/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/net-im/msn-proxy/pkg-plist (new)
